query: SELECT id, title, summary, body, versionLabel, category, active, publishedAt, createdAt FROM release_notes WHERE id = 30001 OR title LIKE '%Proof%' OR body LIKE '%Proof%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC; SELECT releaseNoteId, COUNT(*) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_note_acknowledgements WHERE releaseNoteId IN (30001) GROUP BY releaseNoteId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT id, title, summary, body, versionLabel, category, active, publishedAt, createdAt FROM release_notes WHERE id = 30001 OR title LIKE '%Proof%' OR body LIKE '%Proof%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC; SELECT releaseNoteId, COUNT(*) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_note_acknowledgements WHERE releaseNoteId IN (30001) GROUP BY releaseNoteId;
messages: 30001	Community Care catch-up: recent app changes	A catch-up note for recent edits that should have been communicated as an in-game acknowledgement popup.	Community Care note: a few visible improvements were made before they were properly explained here. That was a communication miss, so this catch-up popup now records them clearly.

What changed: mobile navigation now supports swipe movement between sections with smoother transitions; boost tokens on the Board are tucked into a tappable drawer so the leaderboard is easier to read; the mobile top-three podium was redesigned as a horizontal stepped podium with rank-specific motion; and the Proof section design direction was reviewed so future proof posts can keep person, media, teaching, and deep thought together instead of losing context.

What you need to do: nothing is required except acknowledging this note. Going forward, visible edits should be posted through this Community Care / patch-note popup so participants know what changed and why.	Care catch-up 2026-05-10	community_care	1	2026-05-10 22:18:37	2026-05-10 22:18:37
